overall.description: A character rides a giant bird mount flying over a dark fantasy coastal landscape at night. The scene features rocky cliffs, ancient stone ruins with warm torchlight, and expansive ocean waters, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with a deep blue atmospheric color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside with ancient torch-lit ruins

events.description: bird mount banks slightly right while passing a large torch-lit stone ruin on the cliffside

agents.ego_description: flying steadily on a giant bird mount along the cliff edge, maintaining altitude while passing ancient structures with glowing orange torches

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with patches of grass, forming the left boundary of the flight path
ancient stone structures with warm orange torchlight glowing from within, built into the cliffside
dark blue ocean water stretching to the horizon with gentle wave patterns visible
distant mountain silhouettes fading into the dark blue night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character riding a giant bird mount along a coastal cliff at night. The left side features steep cliffs with ancient ruins illuminated by warm torchlight, while the right side opens to a vast dark ocean. The camera maintains a steady aerial altitude as it glides forward, passing stone arch structures built into the cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: ocean expanse with scattered rocky islands and ruins

events.description: mount executes a wide banking turn to the right, circling over a circular stone ruin on a hilltop

agents.ego_description: soaring over open ocean water and rocky islets, making a wide arcing turn toward the coastline while approaching ancient circular ruins

entered.detail: small rocky island formation jutting from the ocean with jagged stone peaks
large circular stone structure resembling a coliseum or arena ruin situated on a hilltop
narrow dirt path winding along the coastline, visible from aerial perspective
tall thin rock formations rising from the landscape like natural pillars

segments.scene_description: Leaving the cliffside behind, the bird mount banks right over the open ocean, revealing scattered rocky islets and a prominent circular stone ruin on a distant hill. The camera follows the mount's arcing trajectory as it turns toward the coastline, showing winding paths and tall rock spires against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shoreline with beaches and crashing waves

events.description: mount descends to lower altitude, flying closer to the water surface along the coastline

agents.ego_description: flying low over the coastal waters at reduced altitude, following the shoreline contour with waves visible below

entered.detail: sandy beach area visible along the coastline with light-colored sand contrasting against dark water
white foam waves crashing against coastal rock formations
large rocky outcrop formation rising from the coastal waters

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the bird mount descending to fly low along the coastline, with sandy beaches visible on the left and waves crashing against rocks on the right. The camera maintains a steady forward motion at reduced altitude, skimming over the dark ocean water as it follows the shoreline's natural curve, passing rock outcrops and coastal formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins along a torchlit cliffside and gradually descends to skim the surface of a dark coastal ocean. It begins by gliding past ancient stone ruins and archways built into steep cliffs, with warm light contrasting against the deep blue of the night. As the bird mount banks right, the camera leaves the cliffside behind to arc over the open sea, revealing scattered rocky islets and a distant circular ruin atop a hill. The scene then shifts as the mount turns back toward the coastline, passing tall rock spires before descending to a low altitude. Finally, the camera skims the dark water, following the natural curve of the shoreline where sandy beaches meet waves crashing against jagged rock outcrops.
